# Daily Report — 2026-07-05

## Task Completed
Added `bulk_update_problem_tasks` tool to `bulk_tools.py`. Accepts a list of up to 100
`ProblemTaskUpdate` entries, each with a `task_id` (PTASK number or 32-char sys_id) and
up to 8 optional update fields: `short_description`, `description`, `state`, `priority`,
`assigned_to`, `assignment_group`, `work_notes`, `close_notes`. PTASK numbers are
batch-resolved to sys_ids via a single `numberIN` GET before the batch PATCH is issued.
Per-result `task_id` enrichment included in the response. Registered in `service_desk`,
`change_coordinator`, and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2045
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean — pip-audit found no vulnerabilities (only PyPI-absent local packages skipped).
